_comment: actions_catalog.json — single source of truth for all BattleLuck flow actions.

_usage.registered: Flat list of every action name the executor recognises. Add new names here when you add a case to FlowActionExecutor.
_usage.examples: Parameterised example strings grouped by category — used by dev tools, AI, and autocomplete.
_usage.runtime_inject: Per-event action lists injected while the event is RUNNING. Edit this section live; the executor hot-reads it each check. Key = modeId (e.g. 'bloodbath'). Value = array of action strings to execute on next inject tick.

rules: When generating new JSON/actions, prefer canonical action names unless the user explicitly asks for a legacy alias.
Keep legacy aliases available for old configs and imported events.
For destructive/controlled actions, use preview/approval flows unless an admin explicitly enables auto execution.
Prefer announce/notification for LLM autonomous output; combat, spawn, build, and cleanup actions should be reviewed first.
For castle/build work, search first with build.search or palette.add, then use build.spawn:prefab=palette for visual tracked objects.
Live schematics, blueprints, tile/floor/wall construction, platforms, and native geometry destruction are disabled by the strict server-stability profile.
Use logical zone radii, boundary damage/teleport, markers, announcements, and existing world terrain instead of spawning arena geometry.
Do not put teleport actions in event enter flows; SessionController teleports players after the logical preparation and warmup gates complete.
No entrant may initialize live geometry. The first entrant initializes session state only; later players join that same logical session.

Event entry snapshots and removes the old kit, equipment, passives, and ability overrides; event exit removes the event kit before restoring the original snapshot. Never place kit.apply or ability mutations after snapshot.restore.
livesPerPlayer is the managed death limit: 3 means deaths 1 and 2 respawn in the arena, while death 3 eliminates and restores that player.
Tech/progression mutations and entity.destroy are disabled inside events; do not propose or execute them.
Before proposing or executing a live action, validate catalog registration, handler availability, mutation policy, count caps, and prompt policy. Omit or skip any rejected action.
Use merchant.run and merchant.grant for merchant item tokens that map a bought/acquired item prefab or item GUID to a numbered UUID listing in merchant_servant_actions.json.
Companion actions (companion.*) reuse the NpcControlService pipeline. Do not create separate servant.follow, pet.follow, or ai_vampire.follow handlers.
Encounter actions (encounter.*) use the unified NPC/VBlood spawn pipeline with session tracking for cleanup.
Invasion actions (invasion.*) require a prepared session and scale with player count/gear level.
Dungeon actions (dungeon.*) create managed isolated zones within the existing world, not separate-server instances.
MOBA actions (lane.*, match.*) use event-local virtual currency by default. Do not generate permanent inventory money unless explicitly configured.
Boss scaling (boss.scale.*) captures a baseline before modification and can restore original stats.
Creature capture (creature.capture.*) never captures V Bloods, players, or quest-critical entities without explicit admin policy override.
Portal actions (portal.*) use the existing teleport API, not direct transform mutation.
Weather/time actions (world.*) affect the entire server and require admin approval. Never available to ordinary player AI requests.
Client-required actions (structure.fade.policy.set, equipment.appearance.set, ability.slot.policy.set) are labeled client_required and never claim success without visual replication.

notify: announce:title=Setup|message={mode} arena is preparing for {players} player(s).|color=#5CC8FF|level=info

announce.description: Send a colored in-game event announcement. Supports color/rgb/hex, level, title, scope, and placeholders like {mode}, {zone}, {players}, {session}.

merchant.run.description: Execute a configured numbered merchant UUID listing for the current player.

merchant.grant.description: Grant the configured item token for a merchant UUID listing.

ability.set_slot.notes: Only Q/E/R slots are allowed. Travel/T is controlled by kit config.

system.find.description: Hot-reloaded event/admin action that asks AI to explain matching ECS/ProjectM/Unity/EOS systems.

system.register.description: Admin-approved live registration of an exact ProjectM or Unity ECS system.

spawn.boss.description: Spawn and register a controlled event boss.

sequence.custom.preview.description: Preview a reusable BattleLuck custom sequence without executing it.

sequence.custom.play.description: Run a named custom sequence from custom_sequences.json.

sequence.step.run.description: Execute a specific step from a registered sequence.

sequence.step.skip.description: Skip a specific step in a registered sequence.

sequence.step.retry.description: Retry a specific step in a registered sequence.

objective.deliver.description: Require a player to carry an optional item to a target position.

death.prevent.notes: Consumes one charge per prevented death.

clan.task.add.description: Creates a persistent world or event clan task.

clan.task.update.description: Adds trusted admin progress to an active clan task.

clan.task.progress.description: Adds trusted admin progress to an active clan task.

clan.task.reward.description: Internal completion action that dispatches the configured reward.

companion.assign.description: Assign an already-controlled NPC to a player as a companion.

companion.follow.description: Command a companion to follow a player.

companion.guard.description: Command a companion to guard a position.

companion.dismiss.description: Unassign a companion without destroying the NPC.

companion.despawn.description: Destroy a BattleLuck-owned companion and remove persistent tracking.

companion.behavior.set.description: Set companion behavior: follow, guard, patrol, wander, flee, or assist.

companion.limit.set.description: Set per-player, per-clan, or per-event companion limits.

creature.capture.validate.description: Read-only validation of creature capture eligibility.

creature.capture.apply.description: Capture a creature and convert it to a prisoner or servant.

creature.capture.release.description: Release or restore a captured entity.

creature.blood.threshold.set.description: Set blood quality thresholds for creature capture.

encounter.spawn.description: Spawn a tracked encounter group through the unified NPC pipeline.

encounter.named_unit.spawn.description: Spawn a named encounter unit with custom display name and behavior.

encounter.random.select.description: Deterministic random encounter selection from a table.

encounter.wave.start.description: Start a timed encounter wave sequence.

encounter.cleanup.description: Remove all entities tracked under the current encounter/session ID.

invasion.prepare.description: Prepare a castle invasion session without spawning enemies.

invasion.start.description: Start a castle invasion with wave-based enemy spawns.

invasion.scale.description: Scale invasion difficulty based on player progression.

invasion.wave.spawn.description: Spawn a specific wave during a castle invasion.

invasion.target.set.description: Set the target priority for invasion units.

invasion.end.description: End a castle invasion with victory, defeat, or timeout result.

invasion.cancel.description: Cancel an invasion without victory rewards.

portal.create.description: Create a teleport portal between two markers.

portal.teleport.description: Teleport a player through a portal.

portal.return.bind.description: Store the player's return point for the current event run.

portal.return.execute.description: Teleport the player back to their bound return point.

dungeon.session.create.description: Create a managed dungeon session within the existing world.

dungeon.layout.load.description: Load a dungeon room layout from a schematic.

dungeon.room.activate.description: Activate a dungeon room with its encounter.

dungeon.boss.spawn.description: Spawn a dungeon boss through the unified spawn pipeline.

dungeon.complete.description: Complete a dungeon session with rewards.

dungeon.abort.description: Abort a dungeon session and clean up all tracked entities.

boss.spawn.policy.set.description: Control future boss spawn permission by scope.

boss.spawn.suppress.description: Temporarily suppress boss spawns by scope.

boss.scale.apply.description: Scale a boss's stats based on player count.

boss.scale.refresh.description: Recalculate boss scaling when active attacker count changes.

boss.scale.reset.description: Restore a boss's original stats from captured baseline.

boss.unlock.policy.set.description: Set V Blood unlock policy separate from combat scaling.

lane.define.description: Define a MOBA lane with waypoints. Configuration action, not a direct world mutation.

lane.wave.spawn.description: Spawn a minion wave on a MOBA lane.

lane.unit.advance.description: Command a lane unit to advance along its waypoint path.

lane.tower.spawn.description: Spawn a defensive tower on a MOBA lane.

lane.structure.damage.description: Apply controlled damage to a lane structure.

match.currency.grant.description: Grant event-local virtual currency to a player.

match.currency.spend.description: Atomic validation and deduction of event-local currency.

match.form.policy.set.description: Set allowed and blocked forms for a MOBA match.

match.recall.description: Return a player to their team base after a channel time.

world.weather.set.description: Set the world weather with optional transition and duration.

world.time.advance.description: Advance world time. Affects the entire server.

world.time.set.description: Set the world time to a specific hour/minute.

sunlight.damage.scale.description: Scale sunlight damage by a multiplier.

sunlight.rule.set.description: Set sunlight rules: normal, disabled, or lethal.

player.revive.duration.set.description: Set the revive/respawn duration for a player.

player.revive.duration.reset.description: Reset a player's revive duration to default.

player.movement.modifier.apply.description: Apply a movement speed modifier to a player.

player.movement.modifier.remove.description: Remove a movement speed modifier from a player.

zone.movement.modifier.set.description: Set a movement speed modifier for all players in a zone.

ability.cooldown.multiplier.apply.description: Apply a cooldown multiplier to a player's abilities.

ability.cooldown.multiplier.reset.description: Reset ability cooldown multipliers for a player.

ability.loadout.capture.description: Capture a player's current ability loadout.

ability.loadout.apply.description: Apply a saved ability loadout to a player.

ability.loadout.bind_weapon.description: Bind a loadout to a specific weapon type.

ability.loadout.unbind_weapon.description: Unbind a loadout from a weapon type.

ability.slot.policy.set.description: Set ability slot policies for a player or event.

equipment.template.create.description: Create a custom equipment template. Configuration action requiring approval.

equipment.template.validate.description: Validate an equipment template without applying it.

equipment.template.grant.description: Grant a custom equipment item to a player.

equipment.appearance.set.description: Set equipment appearance. Client-visible; requires replication.

object.variant.set.description: Change a placed object's variant prefab.

schematic.capture.description: Capture a schematic from existing world objects.

structure.railing.remove.description: Remove railings from a structure. Implemented as object.remove with filter.

structure.fade.policy.set.description: Set structure fade policy. Client-render feature; requires client bridge.

servant.hunt.snapshot.description: Capture the latest valid hunt assignment for repeat.

servant.hunt.repeat.description: Repeat the last servant hunt with selection controls.

servant.hunt.assign.description: Assign a servant to a hunt mission.

servant.hunt.validate.description: Validate servant availability, castle ownership, and hunt destination.

item.durability.regeneration.set.description: Set durability regeneration for items in a container category.

item.durability.regeneration.remove.description: Remove durability regeneration for a container category.

container.item.rule.set.description: Set a rule for items in a container.

crafting.mastery.progress.add.description: Add experience to a crafting mastery category.

crafting.mastery.bonus.set.description: Set crafting mastery bonuses for a category.

crafting.result.modify.description: Runtime hook action called after a verified craft result.

mastery.perk.unlock.description: Unlock a mastery perk for a player.

mastery.perk.reset.description: Reset all mastery perks in a tree.

player.afk.evaluate.description: Evaluate if a player is AFK.

player.afk.remove.description: Remove an AFK player from the server.

siege.policy.set.description: Set siege policy for a player, clan, zone, or server.

castle.raidability.set.description: Set whether a castle can be raided.

actions.description: Announce a message to all players in the session via native chat notification.
sideEffects: Sends chat message to all connected clients

actions.description: Spawn tracked NPCs through the unified server spawn pipeline.
VISUAL ONLY — Requires client mod. Glow effects are not replicated to vanilla clients.

sequences.name: Bloodbath Intro
sequences.description: Standard intro sequence for Bloodbath mode.
